title: 406 error when uploading feature image to WordPress
symptom: When attempting to upload a feature image to WordPress, a 406 error is returned, indicating that the request is not acceptable.
applies_when: Using the WordPress node to upload images
Image format or settings may not be compatible
not_this_if: Error does not occur when uploading other types of content
root_cause: The 406 error is typically caused by server-side security settings, such as ModSecurity, which may block certain requests based on their content type or headers. In this case, the image upload request is being rejected.
fix_steps: Use the 'edit image' node in n8n
Attempt to upload the image again
agent_instruction: Use the 'edit image' node to convert the image to JPEG format before uploading.
